about.en: Dogecoin is a proof-of-work cryptocurrency originally created as a meme coin. DOGE is used for tipping and payments.
about.es: Dogecoin es una criptomoneda de prueba de trabajo (proof-of-work) creada originalmente como meme coin. DOGE se usa para propinas y pagos.
about.ca: Dogecoin és una criptomoneda de prova de treball (proof-of-work) creada originalment com a meme coin. DOGE s'utilitza per a propines i pagaments.
